seo.title: David Richards: A Photographer's Point of View — Who's to Say Foundation
seo.description: Meet David J. Richards, a Who's to Say Foundation participant building his voice as a photographer one frame at a time.

listing.title: David Richards: Behind the Lens
listing.summary: A camera became David's way of stepping into the world and building a point of view of his own.
listing.label: Participant Story · Vol. 01
listing.imageAlt: David J. Richards holding a camera on the football sideline

hero.eyebrow: A Who's to Say story · Vol. 01
hero.title: David Richards: eye to eye with the moment.
hero.lead: David J. Richards is building his voice as a photographer one frame at a time, moving between sports, family, studio practice, and everyday details.
hero.imageAlt: David J. Richards holding a camera on the football sideline

sections.heading: A camera became David's way of stepping into the world.
paragraphs: DJR Photography is a real person learning to look closely, move with purpose, and tell stories about people, places, games, and family through the lens.
The common thread in David's work is attention: looking long enough to notice the thing other people might miss.

sections.heading: Learning the frame.
paragraphs: David's work moves from studio practice to cold nights on the track and the sideline, where he studies the field and waits for a face, a posture, the light, and the split second where a person becomes the story.
sections.imageAlt: David composing a photograph with a Nikon camera
sections.caption: Behind the lens

sections.heading: Practice, focus, and the confidence that grows with every shot.

sections.quote: The dream. The hard work. The moment. The capture.

sections.heading: Keep exploring DJR Photography.
sections.body: David's participant portfolio remains its own site, with galleries and the work he continues to build.

sections.heading: Help more participants build visible work.
sections.body: Support accessible tools, creative practice, and participant-owned pathways.
